rules.rule: Page hooks MUST call view services for data, never brokers or foundation services.
Hook files MUST follow pattern use{Purpose}.ts (e.g., useDashboardPage.ts).
Page hooks MUST manage loading and error state.
Hooks MUST return object with data, loading, error, and handlers.
Hooks MUST use useEffect for data fetching on mount.
Hooks MUST be in src/hooks/ directory.
Hooks MUST NOT contain UI rendering logic.
Hooks MUST NOT call brokers directly.
Hooks MUST handle exceptions from view services.
Page hooks MUST fetch data on mount and when dependencies change.
Hooks MUST use TypeScript for all types.
Hooks MUST export as named exports.
Event handlers MUST use useCallback when passed to components.
Hooks MUST clean up effects properly.
